name: ALCopsInstallAnalyzers
description: [Deprecated] Use ALCopsDownloadAnalyzers@1 instead. Download and install ALCops code analyzers for AL (Business Central) with automatic or manual TFM selection
author: ALCops

inputs.name: version
inputs.label: ALCops Version
inputs.helpMarkDown: Version to install: `latest`, `prerelease`, or a specific version (e.g., `1.2.3`)

inputs.name: packageSource
inputs.label: Package Source
inputs.helpMarkDown: Where to download the ALCops package from

inputs.name: localPackagePath
inputs.label: Local Package Path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Path to a local `.nupkg` file (for air-gapped environments)

inputs.name: tfm
inputs.label: Target Framework
inputs.helpMarkDown: The .NET target framework. Leave empty + provide `compilerPath` for auto-detection, or set explicitly.

inputs.name: compilerPath
inputs.label: AL Compiler Path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Path to the directory containing `Microsoft.Dynamics.Nav.CodeAnalysis.dll`. The directory is searched recursively if the DLL is not found in the root. Used for auto-detection when `tfm` is not set.

inputs.name: outputPath
inputs.label: Output Path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Where to place extracted analyzer DLLs. Defaults to `$(Build.SourcesDirectory)/.alcops`

outputVariables.name: tfm
outputVariables.description: The detected or specified target framework moniker

outputVariables.name: analyzerPath
outputVariables.description: Full path to the directory containing the extracted analyzer DLLs

outputVariables.name: analyzers
outputVariables.description: Semicolon-separated list of analyzer DLL paths
